title: Hieracium holmiense
taxonomy: Hieracium holmiense is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It belongs to the genus Hieracium, which is commonly known as hawkweeds. This plant is native to Denmark, Greenland, Iceland, Norway, and Sweden. The genus Hieracium is part of the larger family Asteraceae, which is a diverse group of flowering plants. As part of the Asteraceae family, Hieracium holmiense is classified as a member of the infragroup known as the clade, comprising over 23,000 species.
